docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $200.00 SERVED DEC-03-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, BRENDA
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, ALEJANDRO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOPEZ, BRENDA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER CONTINUED TO DEC 1, 2016 AT 1:30. THIS MATTER IS TO BE HEARD WITH CASE # CSM-16-853214
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY OF SC-100 MAILED TO BRENDA LOPEZ ON 11/09/16. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-RETURNED FOR BETTER ADDRESS-NO SUCH NUMBER."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PEREZ, ALEJANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, BRENDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-01-2016 - CONTINUED ON COURTS OWN MOTION TO JAN-12-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-01-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ALEJANDRO PEREZ. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BRENDA LOPEZ WITH ASSISTANCE FROM COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHANNON RAINTREE. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE PROCESS OF SERVICE. THIS MATTER TO BE HEARD WITH CASE # CSM-16-853214. SPANISH INTERPRETERS REQUESTED FOR BOTH PARTIES FOR DEC. 1, 2016 HEARING. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-12-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-12-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
